description: You are an Occupational Health Nurse (OHN) at Meridian Industrial Services, a manufacturing company with 800 employees. Logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as admin (username: admin, password: adminadmin), implement the employee wellness program detailed in the enrollment brief at /home/ga/Documents/occ_health_enrollment_brief.txt. Register the three identified employees, create the ergonomic intervention workout routine with its training days and exercises, set up the Metabolic Risk Reduction nutrition plan with its macro goals and five named meals, and establish the two specified body composition measurement categories. All usernames, email addresses, routine names, day names, day-of-week assignments, exercise names, nutrition plan details, meal names, measurement categories, and units must match the specification document exactly.

metadata.expected_routine_description: 12-week cardiovascular risk reduction program for sedentary manufacturing workers
